static_audit.reason: CUDA backend supports fused conv1d unless KILN_DISABLE_FUSED_CONV1D is set, and kiln-conv1d-kernel supports the Qwen3.5 bf16/F32 state, seq_len=1, kernel_size=4 envelope.

implementation.conclusion: No minimal implementation was justified by completed measurement; this PR ships attribution instrumentation and audit docs only.

validation.reason: RunPod SSH failures during required validation/build phase prevented tests and benchmark collection.

pods.failure: wait-file timed out; SSH reset connections
wait-file timed out; bounded SSH state check produced no output

recommendation: Re-run C52 native-MTP decode with C53 child NVTX ranges. If update dominates, move to gates + gated_norm; if layout dominates, open a separate minimal layout task.
